feature.name: Organizer Detail
feature.description: Orchestrates one public organizer identity across consumer Flutter, host Flutter, and marketing-web projections while preserving surface-specific membership, navigation, claim, review, and indexing behavior.

actionScope.included: Consumer organizer-detail retry, membership, notification, share, schedule, host-contact, and host-profile actions owned by the shared Club Detail route and its controllers.
excluded: Review creation and response behavior retains the shared review-section owner; embedded read-only previews suppress route actions; Host operational controls remain outside this public profile route.

actions.description: Invalidates the organizer-detail view model once for the current failed load state.
Routes a signed-out viewer to authentication while preserving the organizer-detail return path.
Creates the current viewer's organizer membership once for the active membership version.
Removes the current viewer's organizer membership once for the active membership version.
Toggles organizer push notifications once for the current membership preference version.
Opens the organizer share-card sheet for the current profile.
Routes a selected upcoming organizer event to consumer Event Detail.
Routes a selected organizer host identity to Public Profile.
Starts or resolves the viewer-host conversation once and opens its member chat.
Opens a typed organizer Instagram, phone, or email contact target.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These consumer organizer-detail states have deterministic captures and previews but no state-level test registered by the screen authority.

actionScope.included: Host-shell public organizer preview retry, share, schedule navigation, host-profile, and typed contact actions from the shared Club Detail route.
excluded: Consumer membership controls are suppressed; edit organizer, create event, team, payout, and other operations remain owned by Host Home and Host Organizers.

actions.description: Invalidates the shared organizer-detail view model once for the current host-route failure state.
Opens the organizer share-card sheet from the host public preview.
Routes a hosted schedule row to the Host Event Manage projection.
Opens a selected organizer host's public profile from the host-shell preview.
Opens a typed organizer contact target from the host public preview.

evidenceExceptions.reason: Host schedule navigation is route-tested but has no distinct visual capture beyond the populated schedule state.
These host public-preview states have deterministic captures and previews but no state-level test registered by the screen authority.

actionScope.included: Public organizer listing save, share, claim-request, and public-review mutations with indexing, runtime, event-supply, and claim capability states.
excluded: Anchor navigation, canonical/legacy path resolution, event and source links, recommended-organizer navigation, and metadata emission retain route, static-output, and section owners.

actions.description: Toggles the local saved-organizer state and records organizer-save analytics when saved.
Uses native share, clipboard, or a manual URL fallback and exposes completion, cancellation, or error status.
Validates and submits one typed organizer claim request when policy, runtime, and authentication allow it.
Validates and submits a public organizer review, preserving moderation-pending and published response semantics.

evidenceExceptions.reason: Noindex and canonical metadata are static-output properties proved by postbuild tests rather than a meaningful rendered Storybook variant.
